title: Vision Sequence for Local, Tool, and Arm Setting
description:
Vision Sequence for Local, Tool, and Arm Setting

Vision Sequence for Local, Tool, and Arm Setting

To detect the local coordinate of the calibration plate by using a camera, a vision sequence to recognize the calibration plate is necessary.

Set properties for the sequence (ExposureTime, etc.) so that dots on the optional calibration plate can be recognized clearly.  The vision object is not necessary.

To execute calibration of local, tool, and arm sttings using a camera, a vision sequence for detecting position of the calibration target is necessary.  Create a sequence that has a vision object for detecting a position of one target in the same way as Vision Sequence for Detecting One Target.
